Cc: procurement <procurement@finetext.ai>
Date: 2027-02-20T09:12:00-08:00

Ben,

We saw a significant spike in tail latency starting ~08:40 PST today; our customer-facing e...
text:
From: Samir Patel <samir@finetext.ai>
To: Ben Carter <ben@redwood.ai>
Cc: procurement <procurement@finetext.ai>
Date: 2027-02-20T09:12:00-08:00
Subject: Major latency/SLA hits this morning — request for credit and plan

Ben,

We saw a significant spike in tail latency starting ~08:40 PST today; our customer-facing endpoints backed by the Redwood API reported increased 500/timeout rates and elevated P95/P99. We believe the root cause is the content-filter module invoking downstream moderation tooling redundantly — when the filter path returned an error the runtime retried and amplified latency.

This impacted three production services at Finetext (indexing, assistant, and summarization). Our ops attach a CSV with the request IDs and timestamps. We need: a formal SLA credit for the period of 08:40–09:50 PST and a remediation plan with timelines. Please escalate — this impacts our renewa...
